nasb.text: And the hand of the Lord was with them, and a large number who believed turned to the Lord.

esv.text: And the hand of the Lord was with them, and a great number who believed turned to the Lord.

cnv.text: 主的手與他們同在，信而歸主的人就多起來。

ccb.text: 上帝的能力伴随着他们，有许多人信了主。

csbs.text: 主的手与他们同在，有许许多多的人就相信、归向了主。
